ast.source: Hides the warning modal and assumes that all mass actions are approved

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Root folder where backups are stored.  If not specified and you run a backup, root is specified as the root of your Cloudinary media library
ast.target: 存放备份的根文件夹。如果未指定且运行备份，则 root 会被指定为你的 Cloudinary 媒体库根目录

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Preserve vault file path relative to root backup folder.  If disabled, assets will be placed in 'root', whether the above backup folder or root of Cloudinary Media library
ast.target: 保留相对于备份根文件夹的 vault 文件路径。若禁用，资源将放置在“root”中，无论是上述备份文件夹还是 Cloudinary 媒体库根目录

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 正在覆盖现有缓存适配器

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Proxy is set, but request uses a custom agent, proxy is ignored.
ast.target: 已设置代理，但请求使用自定义代理，已忽略代理。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: There were errors completing your operation.  Please look at the developer console for further information
ast.target: 完成操作时出现错误。请查看开发者控制台以获取更多信息

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The operation is complete.  No errors to report
ast.target: 操作已完成。无错误可报告

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Upload of vault files started.  Depending on your vault size, this could take a long while.  Watch for error or success notices
ast.target: 已开始上传库文件。根据库大小，这可能需要较长时间。请留意错误或成功通知

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cloudinary vault asset backup: There was some success in uploading vault files, as well as some errors.  Open Developer Tools for error information in Console
ast.target: Cloudinary 库资产备份：部分库文件上传成功，也有一些错误。打开开发者工具在控制台查看错误信息

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cloudinary vault asset backup: This was successfully completed.  No errors to report
ast.target: Cloudinary 库资产备份：已成功完成。无错误可报告

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cloudinary vault asset backup: This operation failed. Please try again
ast.target: Cloudinary 资料库资源备份：此操作失败。请重试

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: It looks like your Cloudinary Cloud Name or Upload Preset were not defined.  Uploads to Cloudinary will fail if these are not set.  Please visit plugin settings, or disable plugin to stop this error. Falling back to default paste behaviour
ast.target: 看起来你的 Cloudinary Cloud Name 或 Upload Preset 未定义。若未设置这些，上传到 Cloudinary 将会失败。请访问插件设置，或禁用插件以停止此错误。将回退为默认粘贴行为
